microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a 2-person operation into a **platformized system**, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise partners including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud **network isolation test** tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract requiring zero customer disruption.

Built an internal **AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, reducing planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21% — demonstrating hands-on AI/ML integration in enterprise cloud security operations.
microsoft_2023: Championed adoption of **AI-driven code generation** workflows across Azure, conducting technical demos and partner-facing training sessions that drove utilization across 14 key teams and saved **37 engineering hours** monthly.

Shaped the product roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by leading 11+ discovery interviews with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and translating technical feedback directly to product management.

Improved data integrity and retrieval by migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** platform with rigorous metadata standards, cutting lookup time by 83% across internal engineering and security teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ enterprise service teams.

Conducted discovery with 20+ service teams to identify 81 hours of manual effort per region launch, then built a **roadmap to automate critical paths** — directly mirroring pre-sales discovery and PoC scoping for SaaS security deployments.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to prioritize high-impact automation gaps and present data-driven recommendations to executive stakeholders.

Drove strategic alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement automated **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing integration risk across distributed systems.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, resolving 40+ high-priority tickets and stabilizing the developer intake process to maintain **continuous delivery** velocity.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals through a redesigned CRM process, improving sales cycle efficiency and partner-facing responsiveness.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web presence and Google profile to surface the brand in competitive local markets.

Improved leadership pricing models by analyzing **1,000+ project records** to identify and close margin leaks, delivering a profitability framework that informed strategic sales and resource allocation decisions.
